headline: Citizens Sees Compelling Razor/Razor Blade Ecosystem As A Driver Of Sustainable Growth For Stereotaxis (STXS)
summary: Given its significant hedge fund backing and attractive upside potential, Stereotaxis, Inc. (NYSEAMERICAN:STXS) is one of the most promising robotics stocks. Stereotaxis, Inc.
